title: Buffer-overflow defense quiz — ASLR vs stack protection vs safe libs
html:
CS security quiz — "Which of the following defends against the first step of buffer overflow attacks?" options: safe libraries / safe coding / stack protection / executable address space protection / ASLR. Same course as the May 11 access-control quiz and the May 14 WebP heap overflow reading.

buffer overflow · cs coursework · osu · d2l
